name: Shards of Alara

draft.notes: Pack is 10 commons, 3 uncommons, a rare, a basic land, and an ad card. If a foil appears it follows the ad card, displacing a common.

sourceNotes: First set of this size and the first set with mythic rares. Printed in USA only (Belgian unknown). 36 packs per box. Booster has both a basic land and an ad card. Tournament packs described but not modelled.
